raw_question: 2025年第三季度，10家公司的研发费用总额占营业总收入总额的比例（整体研发费用率）
raw_question_json: [{"Q":"2025年第三季度，10家公司的研发费用总额占营业总收入总额的比例（整体研发费用率）"}]

query_plan.question: 2025年第三季度，10家公司的研发费用总额占营业总收入总额的比例（整体研发费用率）

sql:
WITH selected_companies AS (
  SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, operating_expense_rnd_expenses, total_operating_revenue
  FROM financials_view
  WHERE report_period = '2025Q3'
  ORDER BY operating_expense_rnd_expenses DESC
  LIMIT 10
)
SELECT 
  SUM(operating_expense_rnd_expenses) AS total_rnd_expenses,
  SUM(total_operating_revenue) AS total_operating_revenue,
  CASE 
    WHEN SUM(total_operating_revenue) = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE SUM(operating_expense_rnd_expenses) * 100.0 / SUM(total_operating_revenue)
  END AS overall_rnd_expense_ratio_percent
FROM selected_companies;

WITH selected_companies AS (
  SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, operating_expense_rnd_expenses, total_operating_revenue
  FROM financials_view
  WHERE report_period = '2025Q3'
  ORDER BY operating_expense_rnd_expenses DESC
  LIMIT 10
)
SELECT 
  SUM(operating_expense_rnd_expenses) AS total_rnd_expenses,
  SUM(total_operating_revenue) AS total_operating_revenue,
  CASE 
    WHEN SUM(total_operating_revenue) = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE SUM(operating_expense_rnd_expenses) * 100.0 / SUM(total_operating_revenue)
  END AS overall_rnd_expense_ratio_percent
FROM selected_companies;

turn_answers.Q: 2025年第三季度，10家公司的研发费用总额占营业总收入总额的比例（整体研发费用率）

A.content: 2025年第三季度，这10家公司的研发费用总额为825,650.52万元，营业总收入总额为32,856,716.51万元，整体研发费用率约为2.51%。

notes: 根据查询计划，需要计算2025Q3期间10家公司的研发费用总额占营业总收入总额的比例。由于查询计划中companies为空，但top_n为10，我理解为需要选取研发费用最高的10家公司（因为问题可能隐含了“10家公司”是指研发费用最高的10家）。首先筛选出2025Q3的数据，按研发费用降序取前10家，然后计算这10家公司的研发费用总和、营业总收入总和，以及整体研发费用率（以百分比形式表示）。
